Our Story
How it all began

The second Sunday Nengi walked into church, she somehow sat next to Kelechi, and they noticed each other. She did not speak to him, and neither did he... except asking her to excuse him as he stepped out.

She took it personally and actively avoided him after that.

Weeks passed. Kelechi tried to use a mutual friend to engineer an introduction and failed... more than once. Then one day, Kelechi turned to that same friend, Zubbey, and asked, with the kind of casual confidence that fools no one: “Who is that your friend?” He knew exactly what he was doing. Zubbey called Nengi over. They shook hands. They exchanged numbers. They texted each other that same day.

That was April 7th. Three days later, they had their first date. Eleven days after that — April 18th — Kelechi made it official. Not because of some grand feeling or some moment of revelation. Maybe he just knew. He looked into her eyes and saw the future.

On February 19th, he asked her the big question in the most him way possible. He made a film. Their story, their people, cut together into something she'd never seen coming. He booked a cinema, told her it was a friend's private movie premiere. She dressed up, showed up, and settled in. Then she saw him on screen.

She never saw it coming. She said yes anyway. And now, from getting together in 11 days to spending their lives with each other forever.

2024 — The second Sunday
He noticed her
She sat right next to him. He asked her to move. She took it personally. He had no idea.
April 7th, 2024
“Who is that your friend?”
Zubbey made the introduction. Handshake. Numbers exchanged. Texts that same evening.
April 10th, 2024
First date
Three days after meeting. Already, there was no question.
April 18th, 2024
Official
Eleven days in. He looked into her eyes and saw the future.
February 19th, 2026
The proposal
A rented cinema. A private film. Their whole story on screen — then him, on one knee. She never saw it coming.
July 18, 2026
Forever
With the people who matter most in the room.
February 19th, 2026
She never saw it coming

He rented a cinema. Made a film about their story. Invited everyone they loved. Told her it was a friend's movie premiere. Then he got on one knee.
